moments.title: Premier League Pre-Season Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Premier League clubs are deep into their pre-season schedules, with friendlies and training camps underway ahead of the new season starting August 21st.

angles.name: Pre-season buzz
angles.copy: Transfer rumours, new kits, and the first taste of action! Premier League pre-season is in full swing, with teams like Aston Villa and Everton playing friendlies this week. Who are you backing for the new season?

angles.name: Club Specific (Aston Villa)
angles.copy: Aston Villa kick off their pre-season friendlies against Walsall on July 21st. The road to August 21st starts now – ready for the new campaign?

angles.name: Club Specific (Everton)
angles.copy: Everton are in pre-season action this Saturday, July 18th, facing Dundee. How important are these early games for the squad?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival celebrates its 20th anniversary this year, bringing music, comedy, and arts to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th.

angles.name: Festival countdown
angles.copy: Just one week to go until Latitude Festival kicks off in Suffolk! Celebrating 20 years of music, comedy, and arts. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Suffolk spotlight
angles.copy: Henham Park is getting ready for Latitude Festival next week! If you're heading to Suffolk for the big weekend, what's your top tip for a first-timer?

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Final Bow
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival in Nottingham is hosting its final event ever this weekend, July 18th-19th, after 18 years at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Farewell Splendour
angles.copy: It's the last dance for Splendour Festival this weekend in Nottingham! After 18 amazing years, organisers are saying goodbye. Share your favourite Splendour memories!

angles.name: Nottingham's big weekend
angles.copy: Nottingham, get ready for an emotional weekend as Splendour Festival takes its final bow at Wollaton Hall. Who's heading there for the last ever party?

moments.title: WOMAD Festival Celebrates World Music
moments.blurb: The World of Music, Arts and Dance (WOMAD) Festival returns to Neston Park, Wiltshire, from July 23rd to 26th, showcasing global music and culture.

angles.name: Global vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for a world of sound! WOMAD Festival kicks off next week in Wiltshire, bringing incredible music, arts, and dance from across the globe. What's your top international artist discovery?

moments.title: Together Again Festival in Cheshire
moments.blurb: Together Again Festival is set to bring world-class music, arts, and culture to Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24th to 26th.

angles.name: Cheshire festival fun
angles.copy: Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire is gearing up for Together Again Festival next week! Three days of music, arts, and good vibes. Who's joining the party?

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the new quirky BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', which premiered on BBC One and iPlayer on July 11th.

angles.name: New BBC comedy
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a socially awkward robot? Yes please! 'Ann Droid' is out now on BBC One and iPlayer. Have you had a chance to watch it yet?

angles.name: Comedy pick
angles.copy: Looking for a new comedy fix? Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' is bringing the laughs to BBC iPlayer. What's your favourite recent British comedy series?

moments.title: ITV Thriller 'The Dark'
moments.blurb: The moody new thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, is airing this July on ITV.

angles.name: New ITV drama
angles.copy: If you're into moody thrillers, 'The Dark' on ITV is one to watch this July. Starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, it's set in the idyllic Scottish wilderness. Who's tuning in?

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK - After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premiered globally on Netflix on July 12th, catching up with the cast post-pods.

angles.name: Reality TV chat
angles.copy: The drama continues! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 hit Netflix on July 12th. Have you caught up on all the post-pod revelations?

moments.title: Lockerbie Drama Coming to Netflix
moments.blurb: The gripping historical drama 'The Bombing of Pan Am 103' (previously titled 'Lockerbie'), co-produced by BBC and Netflix, will be available globally on Netflix on July 30th.

angles.name: Upcoming drama
angles.copy: A powerful new drama, 'The Bombing of Pan Am 103' (Lockerbie), arrives on Netflix on July 30th. This looks set to be a significant watch. Will you be tuning in?

moments.title: Luke Hemmings Turns 30
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead singer of 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday today, July 16th.

angles.name: Happy 30th Luke
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to Luke Hemmings of 5 Seconds of Summer, who turns 30 today! What's your favourite 5SOS track?

angles.name: 30th Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe Luke Hemmings is 30 today?! From 5SOS to solo hits, he's given us some anthems. What's your go-to Luke Hemmings song?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland is 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, legendary drummer for The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday today, July 16th.

angles.name: Drumming legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland of The Police! His drumming shaped a generation. What's your favourite Police track?

moments.title: Geezer Butler Turns 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the iconic bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday tomorrow, July 17th.

angles.name: Metal icon's birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath turns 77! A true pioneer of heavy metal. What's your all-time favourite Sabbath riff?

moments.title: Brian May is 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19th.

angles.name: Queen legend
angles.copy: On July 19th, we celebrate the 79th birthday of guitar icon Brian May! His solos are unforgettable. Which Queen song has his best guitar work?

moments.title: Fred again.. Turns 33
moments.blurb: The acclaimed DJ and producer Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday on July 19th.

angles.name: Dance music star
angles.copy: Big birthday shouts to Fred again.. who turns 33 this Friday! What's your favourite track he's produced or performed?

moments.title: Carlos Santana Turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar god
angles.copy: On July 20th, we're celebrating the 79th birthday of guitar icon Carlos Santana! His sound is unmistakable. What's your favourite Santana song to chill to?

moments.title: Paul Cook is 70
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer for the iconic punk band the Sex Pistols, celebrates his 70th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Punk rock legend
angles.copy: Seventy years young for Sex Pistols drummer Paul Cook on July 20th! What's your favourite punk anthem that still gets you going?

moments.title: Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens) Turns 78
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, known previously as Cat Stevens, celebrates his 78th birthday on July 21st.

angles.name: Folk icon's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the legendary Yusuf Islam, also known as Cat Stevens, on July 21st! Which of his timeless songs is your favourite?

moments.title: Paloma Faith Turns 45
moments.blurb: British soul singer Paloma Faith celebrates her 45th birthday on July 21st.

angles.name: British soul star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 45th Birthday to the fabulous Paloma Faith on July 21st! What's your favourite track from her incredible career?

moments.title: George Clinton Turns 85
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Funkadelic birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to get down! The legendary George Clinton turns 85 on July 22nd. What's your favourite Parliament-Funkadelic groove?

moments.title: Don Henley is 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of the Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Don Henley of the Eagles on July 22nd! What's your favourite Eagles track featuring his vocals?

moments.title: Selena Gomez Turns 34
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop star birthday
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez on July 22nd! From pop anthems to acting, what's your favourite Selena moment?

moments.title: David Essex Turns 78
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor David Essex celebrates his 78th birthday on July 23rd.

angles.name: British icon's birthday
angles.copy: A very Happy 78th Birthday to the one and only David Essex on July 23rd! What's your favourite hit from this British legend?
